sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21343" key="bw/rimos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βώριμος</orth> or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βῶρμος</orth>, name of a Mariandynian <sense id="n21343.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dirge</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:54" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.54</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
